description: Canonical ErgoScript sources and compiled ergoTrees for the v0 acceptance predicates. Sources are committed verbatim; trees are produced by `npm run compile-predicates` (via @fleet-sdk/compiler). The treeHashBlake2b256 field is BLAKE2b-256 of the raw ergoTree bytes — re-runnable via `npm run verify-predicates` without the compiler.

predicates.name: task_hash_v0
predicates.purpose: Note acceptance predicate. Redemption requires HEIGHT < SELF.R5 and blake2b256(getVar[0]) == SELF.R6.
predicates.source:
{
  val expiry       = SELF.R5[Int].get
  val expectedHash = SELF.R6[Coll[Byte]].get
  val taskOutput   = getVar[Coll[Byte]](0).get
  val actualHash   = blake2b256(taskOutput)
  sigmaProp(HEIGHT < expiry && actualHash == expectedHash)
}

registers.R6: expected task output hash, BLAKE2b-256 (SColl[SByte], 32 bytes)

predicates.name: credential_v0
predicates.purpose: Credential-gated Note acceptance predicate. Redemption requires HEIGHT < SELF.R5, blake2b256(getVar[0]) == SELF.R6, and proveDlog(SELF.R7).
predicates.source:
{
  val expiry       = SELF.R5[Int].get
  val expectedHash = SELF.R6[Coll[Byte]].get
  val authorizedPK = SELF.R7[GroupElement].get
  val taskOutput   = getVar[Coll[Byte]](0).get
  sigmaProp(
    HEIGHT < expiry &&
    blake2b256(taskOutput) == expectedHash &&
    proveDlog(authorizedPK)
  )
}

registers.R6: expected task output hash, BLAKE2b-256 (SColl[SByte], 32 bytes)
